title: Item Cards
body:
A mod that adds Item Cards that can store items like bags

It has 4 different tiers with different sizes and crafting recipes

Tier 1 / Iron - 27 Slots 1728 Items

Tier 2 / Gold - 45 Slots 2880 Items

Tier 3 / Diamond - 66 Slots 4224 Items

Tier 4 / Netherite - 90 Slots 5760 Items
